name_cn:
Original in stock!!
Latest Bobby series shoulder bag, a bag that looks thousands of times better in person than in pictures🙋🏻‍♀️, exquisite and cool, excellent touch of calfskin🐂, high-end and durable, adjustable strap, very spacious, easily fits two phones, the key is it goes perfectly with outfits😘
size:21*5*12cm
